scripts.build: esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url'; import { dirname } from 'node:path'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url); const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url); const __dirname = dirname(__filename);" --outfile=dist/cli.js
scripts.test:runtime: npm run build && node dist/cli.js test-fixtures/sample.ts
